Notice Of Motion For Stipulated Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement
Off Calendar Oct-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S Motion For Stipulated Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement.

The unopposed motion for stipulated judgment pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure, section 664.6 is granted. Moving party shall submit a seperate propsed order that is verbatim to the Court's ruling and a proposed judgment in favor of Capital One Bank (USA), N.A. against Johnrey I. Magcaling in the amount of $13,035.00 plus court costs of $517.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
